author: Haroen Viaene
subject: v6.4.0
body:
# [6.4.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v6.3.0...v6.4.0) (2020-03-18)

### Bug Fixes

* **deps:** fix "too much recursion" error with circular deps ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2899](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2899)) ([49cd97d](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/49cd97d))
